metadata.title: Advocacy groups urge parents to avoid AI toys this holiday season
metadata.description: More than 150 organizations and experts signed an advisory urging parents not to buy AI toys for young children
metadata.author: Associated Press
metadata.keywords: AI chatbots, AI toys, ChatGPT, Common Sense Media, Curio Interactive, Fairplay, Keyi Technologies, Miko, U.S. PIRG, children, consumer advocacy, developmental harm, holiday buying, imaginative play, kids safety, online toys, parental controls, toddlers, toy regulation, toy safety, shnd,child,ai toy,company,parent,kid,miko,product,fairplay,conversation,ai chatbot,young child,advocacy group,holiday season,organization,rachel franz
